text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's been some time since I started<n>my job at Tracen
Academy as a<n>trainer. While I should be at work right<n>
now...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Gurgle...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
My body's crying out in pain, so after<n>a quick call, I'm on
my way to the<n>hospital.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
According to the doctor, it's nothing<n>more than food
poisoning. Relieved to<n>hear it's nothing serious, I grab the<n>
medicine prescribed to me and head<n>home.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Well... Congratulations on being<n>discharged, Mejiro Ardan.
Just make<n>sure you don't overdo it, okay?

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you're sick of hearing this<n>by now, but moderation
is key!<n>Always do your stretches before<n>exercising, and
be sure to ice your<n>legs after.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
The more fractures or sprains you<n>accumulate, the worse
off your legs<n>will be in the long run. Above all else,<n>be
mindful of your condition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Understood, doctor. As always, thank<n>you for your thorough
treatment.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text: Miss Ardan, your chauffeur awaits.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my. So soon? Thank you for<n>informing me.Now then... I
shall be off.<n>Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text: Goodbye! Be careful out there! I<n>mean it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I watch this strangely somber<n>scene between the
hospital staff and<n>their patient, I notice the Tracen<n>uniform
and recognize Mejiro Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The next time I see her is when I get<n>off the bus and arrive
at Tracen<n>Academy. That's when I notice a<n>very worried
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hm... Ah! Ardaaan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it isn't Chiyono O. I see you<n>waited for me to get back
this time as<n>well.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Of course I did! Why wouldn't I?<n>You're finally out of the
hospital and<n>can come to school again!<n>Congratulations,
Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Still, I feel terrible for making you wait<n>out in the cold... I'd
hate to see you<n>get sick just as I'm getting better.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
When we return to the dorms, allow<n>me to brew us both a
cup of tea. I<n>received quite the selection as<n>get-well
presents.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, did she get hospitalizedagain?

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Ah, now that you mention it, I do<n>remember hearing that she
couldn't<n>run in the tryouts due to an injury or<n>illness.

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
But she's race-ready, right? I'd be<n>more worried about
debuting if I were<n>her... I mean, how many times does<n>this
make?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-you there! How dare you—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Chiyono O. I appreciate your concern,<n>but I assure you, I do
not mind the<n>gossip about me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: After all, they're not wrong.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now then, let us make our way back<n>to the dorms before
we both catch a<n>cold.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ah, you want to know more about<n>Mejiro Ardan? Well...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With my curiosity piqued, I've come<n>to Tazuna to learn more
about Mejiro<n>Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
As I'm sure you've heard, she's<n>very prone to illness and
injury.<n>She's been in and out of the hospital<n>since she
started here.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And because of that, she's had to<n>pull out of tryouts and
practice very<n>frequently.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, that means she hasn't<n>been scouted, so she
hasn't made<n>her debut. As for the trainers' opinion<n>of
her... They aren't exactly favorable.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I... think she has potential. She is a<n>Mejiro, after all.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But unfortunately, her body is so<n>fragile. And then there's
the matter of<n>her older sister.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You're a new trainer, but I'm sure<n>you've heard of her.
She's the pride<n>of the Mejiro family—Mejiro Ramonu.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
She won her debut by a whole twenty<n>lengths. During her
Junior division<n>years, she was already reaching<n>speeds
that rivaled the "Hot Rod"<n>Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: And to top it all off, she's the very<n>first Triple Tiara winner.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I could be here all day telling you<n>what makes Ramonu
shine so bright,<n>but... I think the strength of that light<n>also
obscures Ardan's, relegating her<n>to the shadows.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I know Ardan is doing her absolute<n>best...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
However, she's running out of<n>chances to debut. Her next
race may<n>be her last opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Ah, my apologies. I have my own<n>speculations as to
Ardan's future, but,<n>well...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If you're that interested, perhaps it'd<n>be best to talk to
Ardan herself!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
My talk with Tazuna only deepens<n>my curiosity. It must be
hard to live in<n>your sister's shadow as the feeble<n>sibling,
yet all I can picture is Ardan's<n>gentle smile.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Perhaps... I'll go check up on her<n>myself tomorrow.
